seedanceSegments.title: Soy-gloss cutaway hook
seedanceSegments.description: Finished dumpling-lasagna surface, sesame rain, cutaway lift and quick kitchen re-anchor.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context, not camera framing. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as the active island serving view and terrazzo material lock. Use @FinishedDumplingLasagnaCutaway only as final dish geometry: compact 20 cm square steamed dumpling lasagna, translucent wrapper top, soy gloss, sesame, scallion, visible layered cutaway, no tomato or cheese. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseThreeQuarterRight only for consistent visible hands near the pan. Use @TurningSpatula only as the rigid serving lift tool; do not use @SiliconeSpatula for lifting the portion. Generate exactly 4 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 4 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels sexy food-porn ASMR style, macro first. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only soy drizzle, sesame patter, wet turning-spatula lift and soft counter set-down. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s extreme macro dark soy ribbon crawls over the steamy satin wrapper top; 1.0-1.8s white sesame and scallion fall onto the glossy surface; 1.8-3.2s turning spatula lifts one hot square, exposing tender dumpling-wrapper and juicy pork layers; 3.2-4.0s tight context of the finished square pan on the Licorn island. Scale lock: pan is 8 in / 20 cm square, serving lift is one quarter of the pan, height 3-5 cm, wrappers are flat 8-10 cm pieces, not oversized, not miniature. Kitchen continuity: countertop remains light terrazzo; do not redesign kitchen layout. Global negatives: no text on screen, no subtitles, no tomato sauce, no cheese pull, no long lasagna noodles, no folded dumplings, no wood countertop, no new stovetop design.

seedanceSegments.title: Sticky pork-shiitake filling
seedanceSegments.description: Raw filling ingredients become a glossy sticky dumpling filling.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead as active overhead preparation view. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only for visible hands mixing from above. Use @Spoon only as the mixing utensil. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, close overhead detail shots, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only soft meat drop, sticky sauce pour, wet splashes and bowl scrape. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.9s raw pork, finely chopped shiitake, scallion, ginger and garlic are already in a bowl; 0.9-1.7s soy and hoisin pour in dark glossy ribbons; 1.7-2.5s sambal, rice vinegar and sesame oil hit in quick cuts; 2.5-4.0s spoon folds into a tacky cohesive filling; 4.0-5.0s spoon lifts and drops one glossy lump. Food physics lock: filling remains raw, pink-brown, sticky and glossy with shiitake/scallion/chili flecks; not cooked gray, not dry, not smooth pate. Kitchen continuity: keep light terrazzo overhead surface. Global negatives: no text, no gloves floating alone, no cooked meat, no tomato, no cheese, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Oil, first smear and wrappers
seedanceSegments.description: The compact square pan is oiled, filled with the first thin layer, and covered with flat dumpling wrappers.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead as active overhead assembly view. Use @baking_dish only as the square pan reference. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown for visible hands. Use @SiliconeSpatula only for flexible spreading and scraping of the filling; do not use it to lift a finished slice. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels ASMR macro assembly, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only pan set-down, oil smear, silicone spatula scrape and soft wrapper slaps. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s overhead scale anchor of an 8 in / 20 cm square pan on terrazzo; 0.8-1.7s thin oil sheen spreads inside the pan; 1.7-2.8s first 3-5 mm glossy filling layer is spread across the base; 2.8-3.6s one flat palm-size dumpling wrapper flops onto the filling; 3.6-5.0s more wrappers are placed edge-to-edge with minimal overlap, trimming or tucking corners. Scale lock: square pan 20 cm, wrappers 8-10 cm and flat, about 20 wrappers total across recipe, not oversized, not miniature. Geometry lock: this is a flat layered lasagna-style build, not folded dumplings, not long noodles. Kitchen continuity: same light terrazzo overhead. Global negatives: no tomato, no cheese, no noodle sheets, no folded dumplings, no text, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Layer stack and water beads
seedanceSegments.description: More filling and wrapper layers build a compact slab, finished with top wrappers and a tiny water drizzle.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead as active overhead build view and @KitchenIslandDefault only for the quick side height angle. Use @baking_dish as the same square 20 cm pan. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown for visible assembly hands. Use @SiliconeSpatula only for flexible spreading and scraping; do not use it to lift a finished slice. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels ASMR, mostly macro. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only sticky smear, wrapper slap, pan nudge and delicate water drops. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s another spoonful of filling spreads thin over wrappers; 1.0-1.8s second flat wrapper layer lands with seams offset; 1.8-2.6s quick side macro shows stack height only 3-5 cm; 2.6-3.5s final pale wrapper layer is smoothed on top; 3.5-5.0s exactly 3 tbsp / 45 ml water drizzle beads on the top wrapper, no flooding. Scale lock: 20 cm square pan, compact 3-5 cm height, filling layers 3-5 mm, wrappers flat 8-10 cm; not oversized, not miniature. Geometry lock: finish with wrappers on top. Kitchen continuity: same light terrazzo and Licorn kitchen. Global negatives: no soup, no tomato, no cheese, no noodles, no folded dumplings, no text.

seedanceSegments.title: Steam cook reveal
seedanceSegments.description: The square pan steams inside a large saucepan; hard cut to lid lift and tender translucent top.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context. Use @InductionWide as active steaming setup view and @InductionCloseup for simmer and lid-lift details. Use @SaucepanLarge only as the large steamer pot. Use @baking_dish only as the 20 cm square pan nested inside; the pot is visibly wider than the pan. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseThreeQuarterRight only for visible hands during hot handling. Use @Tongs only as the safe tool-first hot handling utensil; no cloth-in-hand transfer. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels steam ASMR style, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only metal set-down, low simmer, lid clink, steam hiss. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s square pan lowers into large saucepan on black flush induction; 1.0-1.8s hot water trembles around outside of pan halfway up the pan wall; 1.8-2.5s lid closes; 2.5-3.5s hard cut after 25 minutes, lid lifts and dense steam blooms; 3.5-5.0s macro of tender satiny slightly translucent top wrapper with steam beads. Scale lock: pan is 8 in / 20 cm square, slab height remains 3-5 cm, pot visibly wider than pan, not oversized, not miniature. Cooking lock: this is steaming, not baking, frying or boiling the lasagna; pork is cooked through by implied 25 minutes. Kitchen continuity: induction remains black flush plate, no flames. Global negatives: no oven, no browning, no flame, no water flooding inside lasagna, no towel fused with hand, no text, no music.
